ops.text: The synckitd Homebrew formula does not kickstart the running daemon on upgrade: brew upgraded synckitd 0.17.0 → 0.19.0 on Jul 19 10:06 and deleted the old Cellar, but the launchd agent com.github.yasyf.synckit.serve kept running the deleted 0.17.0 binary for hours (found while diagnosing the cookiesync auth ioreg failure — the stale daemon wasn't the cause, but it means every synckitd release silently doesn't take effect until something restarts the agent). The cookiesync cask learned this lesson in 0.10.1 (postflight launchctl kickstart); the synckitd formula needs the same postinstall kickstart, or the release notes need a manual step.
